question: What text overlay appears on the screen claiming that choosing vegetables over meat is a healthier option? A. Many people don't know that they don't have to always eat meat to get protein into their diet B. Besides meat, there are a number of vegetables that you can eat C. Moreover, the choice of vegetables over meat is more healthier D. as it reduces the risk of diabetes, heart disease and even some types of cancers
How many red tomatoes are visible on the table next to the salad bowl throughout the video?
What color are the pants or apron worn by the cartoon woman in the video? A. Blue B. Green C. Purple D. Red
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A cartoon woman with short blonde hair and a blue top mixes green salad in a large clear glass bowl using wooden servers. A glass bottle containing yellow liquid and two red tomatoes sit on the table surface next to the bowl. Text overlays regarding diet plans and protein sources display across the screen. The website URL Serious-Fitness-Programs.com remains visible in the corner.

question: How many high protein vegetables are stated in the red title at the top of the screen?

Cartoon woman with short blonde hair, blue eyes, wearing a light blue short-sleeved top and a purple apron C. Cartoon woman with short blonde hair, blue eyes, wearing a blue t-shirt and purple skirt D. Cartoon woman with short blonde hair, blue eyes, wearing a light blue short-sleeved top and purple pants
Did the on-screen text mention BOTH obtaining protein AND vegetables being healthier? A. Only protein mentioned B. Only healthier mentioned C. Both mentioned D. Neither mentioned
In chunks 7 and 8, where is the text regarding vegetables and meat displayed? A. on the table B. below the main headline C. left side of the screen D. top left corner
In chunks 4, 7, and 8, where is the website URL visible? A. on the table B. top left corner C. left side of the screen D. below the main headline
Describe the sequence of text messages displayed alongside the cartoon woman mixing salad throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a promotional title screen appears with a website URL; at 2s, a cartoon woman begins mixing salad while text about meat protein appears; at 6s, the text changes to mention vegetables you can eat; at 10s, new text explains protein helps lose weight faster; at 14s, the text lists health benefits like reduced disease risks.
